close_reason: Created Solidity deps-cell adapter with npm and git support
description:
Create nix/lib/deps-cell/adapters/solidity.nix that:
- Handles both npm and git dependency sources
- Fetches packages using appropriate fetcher (fetchurl for npm, fetchGit for git)
- Generates rules.star with filegroup targets for each dependency
- Auto-generates remappings based on package structure

Reference: nix/lib/deps-cell/adapters/javascript.nix

Part of Solidity support (turnkey-ri2t).
title: Create Solidity deps-cell adapter
